body:
This PR improves the existing examples and updates them to work with the current version of the model.

There were also a couple of minor changes:
* Output writer API: Filename suffix is now called a file extension. No more inserting underscores for empty names and filename_prefix. User should include underscore if they want one.
* Model metadata:  Use `:CPU` and `:GPU` instead of `:cpu` and `:gpu`. This is so that Oceananigans.jl agrees with the symbols used in GPUifyLoops.jl.
title: Revised and improved examples.
